overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking along a narrow cliffside trail descending to a river canyon. The journey progresses from a shaded rocky overhang to a sunlit riverbank with clear turquoise water and pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded cliffside trail under rock overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow shaded trail with a high rock wall on the right and river visible below on the left

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming a wall on the right side of the narrow trail
turquoise river flowing through the canyon below the trail
scattered evergreen trees growing on the sloping canyon side
distant layered rock formations across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a cliff wall, deep in shadow from the overhanging rock. The turquoise river is visible far below through gaps in the trees, with distant canyon walls rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending trail with increasing vegetation and receding cliff

events.description: trail becomes increasingly illuminated as the cliff wall recedes and sunlight filters through

agents.ego_description: continuing down the winding trail toward the river, moving through denser trees and vegetation

entered.detail: scattered rock formations alongside the trail
thick bushes and small plants lining the riverbank approach

segments.scene_description: The trail widens slightly as the character descends, with the cliff wall receding to the right and the river drawing closer on the left. Vegetation becomes denser, and the lighting transitions from deep shade to dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sunlit riverbank at canyon bottom

events.description: emerging from the shaded cliff path into the open sunlit riverbank area
reaching the water's edge and continuing along the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the open riverbank in full sunlight, navigating around rocks near the water's edge

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks scattered along the river shoreline
tree-covered slopes rising on the opposite side of the river valley
clear blue sky visible overhead now that the cliff overhang is gone

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shade into bright sunlight on the open riverbank. The cliff wall falls away behind, revealing forested hills across the turquoise water. The path continues along the water's edge among scattered boulders.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a shadowed cliffside trail into the bright openness of a sunlit riverbank. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path hugging a steep rock wall in deep shadow, with a turquoise river visible far below through gaps in the trees. As the character descends, the trail widens and the cliff wall recedes, allowing the lighting to transition from heavy shade to dappled sunlight while the river draws closer. The scene then opens fully as the character emerges into bright sunlight on the riverbank, leaving the cliff behind to reveal forested hills across the water. Finally, the path continues along the water's edge, winding through scattered boulders under a clear, bright sky.
